description.overview: The Xoloitzcuintli is an ancient Mexican breed dating back 3,000 years, considered sacred by the Aztecs.
description.temperament: Xolos are loyal, calm, and affectionate with family. They're alert watchdogs but not aggressive.
description.health: Generally healthy. Hairless variety needs skin protection.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs. Daily walks and play sessions.

best_for: Those wanting a unique, ancient breed
verdict.summary: Ancient Aztec dogs in hairless or coated varieties. Xolos are loyal, calm companions perfect for apartments but need skin care.
